hero.subheadline: We build AI systems that work in the real world. Not lab conditions. Not sandbox demos. Production-grade intelligence for teams that care about shipping.

problem.title: EVERYONE WRAPS MODELS. FEW SHIP INTELLIGENCE.
problem.description: Everyone is building wrapper APIs while actual intelligence happens in the weeds: quantization that preserves accuracy, distillation that keeps models useful, edge deployment under real constraints, and low-resource languages everyone ignores. We do not do maybe. We ship.

capabilities.title: AGENTIC WORKFLOWS
capabilities.description: Autonomous systems that close loops, handle errors gracefully, and deliver outcomes without babysitting.

capabilities.title: COMPUTER VISION
capabilities.description: Vision pipelines for mining sites, low-light environments, dust, smoke, poor connectivity, and other places cameras should not work but have to.

capabilities.title: MULTIMODAL AVATARS
capabilities.description: Speech interfaces with STT/TTS, low-latency response, and code-switching that understands how people actually talk.

capabilities.title: R&D PRODUCTS
capabilities.description: Hyperspectral mineral mapping, mining safety pipelines, multilingual conversational AI, and products that compound from field constraints.

work.title: VISION FOR EXTREME ENVIRONMENTS
work.description: Models tested against dust, low light, smoke, intermittent connectivity, and real operational mess.

work.title: WORKFLOWS THAT CLOSE LOOPS
work.description: Case management, document processing, and research automation that handles failure states and finishes the job.

work.title: REAL-TIME SPEECH SYSTEMS
work.description: Low-latency multimodal interfaces built for code-switching, not sterile lab prompts.

process.title: NO ENDLESS DISCOVERY.
process.description: You bring the problem. We dissect constraints, design the architecture, build, test, iterate, and ship something that works.

steps.title: BRING THE PROBLEM
steps.description: Tell us what needs to work, where it breaks, and what constraints matter: compute, latency, data quality, environment, language, and failure cost.

steps.title: DISSECT THE SYSTEM
steps.description: We map the architecture, model choices, deployment surface, and operational risks before pretending anything is solved.

steps.title: BUILD AND SHIP
steps.description: We build, test, iterate, and put the system where it has to survive real users and real conditions.

footer.description: Metafloor builds production-grade intelligent interfaces for teams that care about shipping.
footer.headline: Build the system that runs.
footer.body: If the problem is real, send context. We will tell you if we can solve it and what it takes.

metadata.description: Metafloor builds production-grade AI systems, intelligent interfaces, and custom software for teams that care about shipping.
